source: Android PressureDataTest; iOS compressed pressure parser currently indexes outside the one-channel sample

expected.migrationOwnership: Protocol-only characterization excluded from first common KMP migration because current Android/iOS behavior is platform-specific. Use this vector to make an explicit shared parser policy before promoting this behavior to common code.

notes: Android decodes compressed pressure type-0 as an IEEE-754 reference sample and applies frame.factor. iOS is excluded until the compressed pressure parser's one-channel indexing behavior is intentionally fixed or retained for KMP.
